User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /area-clienti/

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://finch-ai.it/sitemap.xml

# Crawl-delay for polite crawlers
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Disallow: /area-clienti/

Allow: /
Disallow: /area-clienti/

Allow: /
Disallow: /area-clienti/
